case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1220 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5086/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 06.03.2025 None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. This petition was filed in the year, 2023 and was lastly fixed in Court on 15.02.2024 when Counsel for the petitioner sought time. Thereafter the matter is fixed in Court today after lapse of one year. The conduct of the petitioner and his Counsel reflects that they are not interested to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
